visualizerParams.title: Recursive Climbing Stairs
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided climbing stairs solution is iterative. Refactor it to use a recursive approach with memoization, which more directly mirrors the subproblem structure of the dynamic programming solution.

solution.explanation: The recursive version with memoization clearly shows that the number of ways to reach step `n` is the sum of ways to reach `n-1` and `n-2`. This is a classic top-down dynamic programming pattern.
